message:
🐛 Enable backdrop click to close Console Studio modal (#10676) (#10685)

Remove closeOnBackdrop={false} from BaseModal so clicking outside the
Console Studio modal closes it, matching standard modal UX patterns.

Also fix tsconfig ignoreDeprecations for TypeScript 6.0.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
